allow: Bash(docker exec postgres-write psql -U postgres -d cqrs_write -c ":*)

Bash(docker exec postgres-write psql -U postgres -d cqrs_write -c "SELECT slot_name, confirmed_flush_lsn, pg_current_wal_lsn\(\), pg_current_wal_lsn\(\) - confirmed_flush_lsn AS lag_bytes FROM pg_replication_slots WHERE slot_name=''cdc_slot'';")
Bash(do docker exec postgres-write psql -U postgres -d cqrs_write -c "SELECT pg_current_wal_lsn\(\) - confirmed_flush_lsn AS lag_bytes FROM pg_replication_slots WHERE slot_name=''cdc_slot'';" -t -A)
Bash(docker exec postgres-write psql -U postgres -d cqrs_write -c "SELECT pg_current_wal_lsn\(\) - confirmed_flush_lsn AS lag_bytes FROM pg_replication_slots WHERE slot_name=''cdc_slot'';" -t -A)

Bash(docker exec postgres-write psql -U postgres -d cqrs_write -c "SELECT pid, application_name, state, left\(query,80\) as query FROM pg_stat_activity WHERE state = ''active'' AND pid != pg_backend_pid\(\);")
Bash(docker exec postgres-write psql -U postgres -d cqrs_write -c "SELECT pid, application_name, state, left\(query,80\) as q FROM pg_stat_activity WHERE state = ''active'';")
